description: The Companies API provides company data enrichment, search, analytics, and AI-oriented company information retrieval. It lets users turn a company domain, email, or social profile into structured company data and related insights.
summary: thecompaniesapi.com exposes a REST API at `https://api.thecompaniesapi.com` authenticated by permanent API tokens, plus an MCP server detected at `http://www.thecompaniesapi.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json` whose auth could not be confirmed from public docs.
